title: Weather
description: Default to IP-based location lookup and support weather queries for the last 7 days, last 30 days, or a custom date range.
searchPlaceholder: For example: Beijing, Shanghai, Tokyo, Singapore
locationPending: Resolving your default city, or search for a place manually.
rangeHint: Custom ranges can span up to 31 days. Future dates are available through {{date}}.
empty: No weather data yet. Resolve a location or search for a city, then apply a range.

notes.note1: The page tries to resolve your current city from IP on load and immediately fetches current weather plus the last 7 days.
notes.note2: The last 7 days and last 30 days presets are primarily for recent historical weather. Custom ranges can merge historical and forecast data when future dates are included.
notes.note3: Each request supports up to 31 days. Future data remains limited by the Open-Meteo forecast window.
notes.note4: If IP-based lookup fails, search for a city directly in either Chinese or English.

errors.missingDate: Please choose both a start date and an end date
errors.invalidRange: The start date cannot be later than the end date
errors.tooLong: A single query cannot exceed 31 days
errors.futureLimit: Future weather is only available through {{date}}
errors.locationRequired: Please resolve your current location or search for a city first
errors.generic: Weather lookup failed. Please try again later.
errors.ipLocateFallback: IP-based default location failed. Search for a city manually to continue.
